SEARCH
Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface DlSystem

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface DlSystem extends AutoCloseable
Datalayer System Instance

This interface extends AutoCloseable, indicating that resources held by implementations of this interface should be properly released when no longer needed, typically by calling the close() method.

  • Method Details

    • start

      void start(boolean boStartBroker)
      Starts a dalayer system
      Parameters:
      boStartBroker - Use true to start a broker. If you are a user of the datalayer - call with false!

    • stop

      void stop(boolean boForceProviderStop)
      Stops a dalayer system
      Parameters:
      boForceProviderStop - Force stop off all created providers for this datalayer system

      Factory Factory()
      Returns the datalayer factory

      void setBfbsPath(String path)
      Sets the base path to bfbs files
      Parameters:
      path - Base path to bfbs files

    • create

      static DlSystem create(String ipcPath)
      Creator of a System instance
      Parameters:
      ipcPath - Path in file system for interprocess communication - use null pointer for automatic detection
      Returns:
      System
